text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
choice_data_list: Did you get enough rest yesterday?
Did you get enough rest yesterday?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I even had time to deep clean my room!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I really fine-tuned the flow of qi, so I'm feeling
great! I'm ready to get to work again today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Copano Rickey really made the
most of her day off.
